name: email-inbox
title: Email Inbox
description: iOS Mail-styled inbox list for AF iPhone-chassis embeds. White background + Apple system blue (#007AFF) unread dots + system-font typography + section dividers (Heute / Gestern / Letzte Woche) + email list items with sender avatar, subject, preview, time, thread count, flag, star. Optional search bar + filter chips + last-updated footer. Composable sub-parts exported: EmailHeader, EmailListItem, EmailSearchBar, EmailFilterRow, EmailSectionDivider. Slots into iphone-chassis (immersive + wallpaper='none') for lead-flow / pipeline demonstrations.
